真正.example_pinyin: Zhēnzhèng de péngyǒu huì zài nǐ yù dào kùnnán de shíhòu bāngzhù nǐ.
真正.example_en: A true friend will help you when you encounter difficulties.

整理.example_zh: 请把桌子上的书整理一下。
整理.example_pinyin: Qǐng bǎ zhuōzi shàng de shū zhěnglǐ yīxià.
整理.example_en: Please tidy up the books on the table.

正常.example_zh: 修理之后，我的电脑又能正常工作了。
正常.example_pinyin: Xiūlǐ zhīhòu, wǒ de diànnǎo yòu néng zhèngcháng gōngzuò le.
正常.example_en: After it was repaired, my computer can work normally again.

正好.example_zh: 你说的跟我理解的正好相反。
正好.example_pinyin: Nǐ shuō de gēn wǒ lǐjiě de zhènghǎo xiāngfǎn.
正好.example_en: What you said is the opposite of what I understand.

证明.example_pinyin: Shì shí zhèng míng tā shì duì de.
证明.example_en: The facts prove that he is right.

之.example_pinyin: Zhè shì Zhōngguó wénhuà zhī yī.
之.example_en: This is one part of Chinese culture.

支持.example_pinyin: Wǒmen liǎng gè yào hùxiāng zhīchí.
支持.example_en: The two of us must support each other.

知识.example_zh: 我在阅读中获得了很多知识。
知识.example_pinyin: Wǒ zài yuèdú zhōng huòdéle hěnduō zhīshì.
知识.example_en: I have gained a lot of knowledge in reading.

值得.example_pinyin: Zhè běn xiǎoshuō zhídé dú yī dú.

植物.example_zh: 这种植物需要很多阳光。
植物.example_pinyin: Zhè zhǒng zhí wù xū yào hěn duō yáng guāng.
植物.example_en: This kind of plant needs a lot of sunlight.

直接.example_pinyin: Xià bān hòu, tā zhí jiē huí jiā le.
直接.example_en: After work, he went straight home.

职业.example_zh: 你理想中的职业是什么？
职业.example_pinyin: Nǐ lǐxiǎng zhōng de zhíyè shì shénme?

只好.example_zh: 雨下得太大了，我们只好留在家里。
只好.example_pinyin: Yǔ xià dé tài dàle, wǒmen zhǐhǎo liú zài jiālǐ.
只好.example_en: The rain was so heavy that we had to stay at home.

只要.example_zh: 只要努力，你一定能把这件事做好。
只要.example_pinyin: Zhǐyào nǔlì, nǐ yīdìng néng bǎ zhè jiàn shì zuò hǎo.
只要.example_en: As long as you work hard, you will be able to do this well.

指.example_zh: 谢谢你指出了我的错误。
指.example_pinyin: Xièxiè nǐ zhǐchūle wǒ de cuòwù.
指.example_en: Thank you for pointing out my mistake.

至少.example_zh: 这座楼至少有一百米高。
至少.example_pinyin: Zhè zuò lóu zhìshǎo yǒu yìbǎi mǐ gāo.
至少.example_en: This building is at least 100 meters high.

质量.example_pinyin: Zhè shuāng xié zhìliàng fēicháng hǎo.
质量.example_en: The quality of these shoes is very good.

重点.example_zh: 他刚才说的才是问题的重点。
重点.example_pinyin: Tā gāngcái shuō de cái shì wèntí de zhòngdiǎn.
重点.example_en: What he just said is the point of the problem.

重视.example_zh: 父母很重视孩子的教育。
重视.example_pinyin: Fùmǔ hěn zhòngshì háizi de jiàoyù.
重视.example_en: Parents attach great importance to children's education.

周围.example_pinyin: Xué xiào zhōu wéi yǒu hěn duō shāng diàn.
周围.example_en: There are many shops around the school.

主意.example_zh: 你有什么好主意，说来听听。
主意.example_pinyin: Nǐ yǒu shé me hǎo zhǔyì, shuō lái tīng tīng.
主意.example_en: Do you have any good ideas, let's hear them.

祝贺.example_zh: 祝贺你们获得了好成绩。

专门.example_pinyin: Wǒ shì zhuānmén lái kàn nǐ de.
专门.example_en: I came to see you specifically.

专业.example_zh: 我在大学学习法律专业。
专业.example_pinyin: Wǒ zài dàxué xuéxí fǎlǜ zhuānyè.
专业.example_en: I am studying law at university.

转.example_zh: 前面第一个路口向左转，你就能看到医院了。
转.example_pinyin: Qiánmiàn dì yī gè lùkǒu xiàng zuǒ zhuǎn, nǐ jiù néng kàn dào yīyuànle.
转.example_en: Turn left at the first intersection ahead and you will see the hospital.

赚.example_pinyin: Tā zuò shēngyì zhuàn le bù shǎo qián.
赚.example_en: He made a lot of money in business.

自然.example_zh: 我们需要保护自然环境。
自然.example_en: We need to protect the natural environment.

自信.example_zh: 他很自信，喜欢与人竞争。
自信.example_pinyin: Tā hěn zìxìn, xǐhuān yǔ rén jìngzhēng.
自信.example_en: He is very confident and likes to compete with others.

总结.example_zh: 请为我们总结您的成功经验。
总结.example_pinyin: Qǐng wèi wǒmen zǒngjié nín de chénggōng jīngyàn.
总结.example_en: Please sum up your successful experience for us.

租.example_zh: 我在公司附近租了房子。
租.example_pinyin: Wǒ zài gōngsī fùjìn zūle fángzi.
租.example_en: I rented a house near the company.

最好.example_pinyin: Tā shì wǒ zuì hǎo de péngyǒu.

尊重.example_zh: 诚实的人值得我们尊重。
尊重.example_pinyin: Chéngshí de rén zhídé wǒmen zūnzhòng.

左右.example_pinyin: Tā kàn qǐlái sìshí suì zuǒyòu.
左右.example_en: He looks about forty years old.

作家.example_zh: 这位作家的小说你读过吗？
作家.example_pinyin: Zhè wèi zuòjiā de xiǎoshuō nǐ dúguò ma?
作家.example_en: Have you read this writer's novel?

作用.example_zh: 这种感冒药对我没什么作用。
作用.example_pinyin: Zhè zhǒng gǎnmào yào duì wǒ méi shénme zuòyòng.
作用.example_en: This cold medicine has no effect on me.

作者.example_pinyin: Zhè běn shū de zuòzhě hěn yǒumíng.
作者.example_en: The author of this book is very famous.

座.example_en: There is a small bridge over the river.

座位.example_zh: 他把座位让给了一位老人。
座位.example_pinyin: Tā bǎ zuòwèi ràng gěile yī wèi lǎorén.
座位.example_en: He gave up his seat to an old man.
